name: Elisa Carver Park
description: Brand new outdoor courts by the soccer fields.  Nice pavilion beside them. Courts are not very smooth, paint is all one color (no change for NVZ), no nets or fence separating the courts to prevent interference. The combination of no lights at the court and bright lights from the park make it nearly impossible to see at dusk.  Better than nothing if you're in the area and it's day time, skip entirely if you have another choice and it's getting late.
